description_long: This is a robust double bed with a solid, rectangular frame and prominent headboard and footboard, each featuring raised panels and thick, squared posts at the corners. The bed is topped with a fitted sheet and two plump pillows, both rendered in a matching color to the bedding. The mattress appears thick and supportive, sitting flush within the frame. The posts and panels give the bed a traditional, sturdy appearance, suggesting durability and a classic design. The surface of the bed is smooth and matte, with no visible decorative carvings or embellishments. The overall color is a uniform dark gray, contributing to a modern yet timeless aesthetic.
description: A sturdy double bed with a thick, paneled frame, matching headboard and footboard, and two pillows on a fitted sheet, all in dark gray.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bed, both pillows, and the prominent headboard and footboard with thick posts.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the footboard's raised panel design and the two pillows resting at the head of the bed.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bed's length, the mattress, and the headboard and footboard structure.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the headboard's panel design and the substantial corner posts.
